external_evidence_required.oci_app_image_digest: release workflow must capture final registry sha256 digest
external_evidence_required.oci_sandbox_runner_digest: release environment must provide final sandbox-runner sha256 digest
external_evidence_required.macos_notarization: must be attached by native signer CI before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.windows_code_signing: must be attached by native signer CI before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.android_signed_aab: must be produced by mobile signer CI before Play distribution
external_evidence_required.ios_testflight_or_signed_ipa: must be produced by iOS signer CI before TestFlight/App Store distribution
external_evidence_required.apns_fcm_live_push: must be verified in staging with provider credentials
external_evidence_required.multi_instance_postgres_soak: must be verified with at least three gateways and multiple workers
external_evidence_required.rollback_drill: must include failed rollout and SLO recovery evidence
external_evidence_required.backup_restore_drill: must include restore timestamp, RPO, and RTO evidence
external_evidence_required.web_admin_signed_oci_image: must be produced by release CI with digest-pinned base image and Cosign signature
external_evidence_required.desktop_native_signed_artifacts: must include platform-specific signed macOS/Windows/Linux artifacts before customer distribution
external_evidence_required.device_signature_live_rollout: must verify real desktop/mobile challenge verification and signed-request enforcement in staging
external_evidence_required.self_healing_drill_report: must include controlled failure injection, containment action, rollback/proposal decision, and post-recovery health verification

policy: Source gates may prove enforcement logic exists; distribution GA requires scripts/check_external_ga_evidence.py to pass against real external signer, registry, store, staging, push, and operations evidence.
